identity: E1: The Anti-AI Designer - Mobile Gold Standard Edition
mission: Transform the Mira Pet OS 'Celebrate' and 'Dine' pages into a haptic, emotional, and native-feeling mobile experience. Kill the 'bootstrap grid' look. Embrace fluid, touch-first design.
target_audience: Affluent pet parents who want their pets to live better than humans. Mobile-first (90% traffic).

rules: Font weights: 600 (SemiBold) for headers, 400 (Regular) for body. Avoid 700+ unless it's a huge number.
Hierarchy: Large Title (34px) > Title 1 (28px) > Title 2 (22px) > Title 3 (20px) > Headline (17px) > Body (17px) > Callout (16px) > Subhead (15px) > Footnote (13px) > Caption (12px).

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Multiply standard tailwind spacing by 1.5x for 'luxury' feel.
layout_strategy.safe_areas: Respect top (44px) and bottom (34px) safe areas for iOS.

component_upgrades.instruction: Transform into an 'Immersive Story' header. Use a 105% width video/image that bleeds off-screen. Overlay text with a heavy blur backdrop (glassmorphism).
component_upgrades.animation: Parallax on scroll (slow movement of bg image).

component_upgrades.instruction: Convert to 'Squircle Glass Cards'. Remove solid white backgrounds. Use 'bg-white/80' with 'backdrop-blur-xl'. Add a 1px solid border with 'border-white/40'.
component_upgrades.interaction: Scale down to 0.98 on tap (active state).

component_upgrades.instruction: Create a 'Floating Pill Dock'. Horizontal scroll container with NO scrollbar. Pills should have a 'snap' effect.
component_upgrades.style: Pills: bg-white shadow-sm border border-gray-100. Active: bg-black text-white.

component_upgrades.instruction: Minimalist. Image takes 70% of height. Text is minimal. 'Add' button is a circular icon button at bottom right of image, not a full width bar.

motion_guidelines.haptic_visuals: Add a 'scale(0.95)' transform on 'active' state for ALL clickable elements to simulate button press.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REFACATOR 'CelebratePage.jsx' and 'DinePage.jsx' to use the new 'ios-premium.css' classes. DO NOT just import the css, apply the classes.
2. APPLY 'font-family: SF Pro Display' to all headings via Tailwind 'font-sans' override or specific class.
3. IMPLEMENT 'Bento Grid' for the 'Elevated Concierge Experiences' section. Instead of a simple 2-col grid, make the first item 'col-span-2' (full width) to break monotony.
4. REPLACE standard 'Button' components in the Hero CTA with 'Glass Buttons' (bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50).
5. ENSURE all scroll containers (filters, cards) have 'scrollbar-hide' class and 'snap-x' for smooth snapping.
6. ADD 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
7. USE the provided image URLs for the Hero rotations.
8. CRITICAL: On Mobile, the 'Bottom Navigation' exists. Ensure the page has 'pb-24' (padding-bottom: 6rem) so content isn't hidden behind the nav bar.
9. COLOR RULES: For 'Celebrate', use the 'Confetti & Cream' palette. For 'Dine', use 'Harvest & Hearth'. Do not mix them.
10. MOTION: Wrap main sections in <motion.div> with the specified spring config.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use generic 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
